description: Dashboard to monitor an instance of the Liquidity Provider Server of the Flyover Protocol

panels.description: Total liquidity in the protocol
panels.title: Total liquidity

panels.description: Total liquidity in the protocol
panels.title: Total liquidity

panels.description: Total liquidity across time in the protocol
panels.title: Total liquidity across time

panels.description: Distribution of the current RBTC Liquidity. This means where is each portion of the RBTC.
panels.title: RBTC Liquidity Distribution

panels.description: Allocation of the current RBTC liquidity. This shows which portion of the liquidity is actually usable.
panels.title: RBTC Liquidity Allocation

panels.description: Distribution of the current BTC liquidity. This means where is each portion of the BTC.
panels.title: BTC Liquidity Distribution

panels.description: Allocation of the current BTC liquidity. This shows which portion of the liquidity is actually usable.
panels.title: BTC Liquidity Allocation

panels.description: Distribution of the current PegIn quotes

targets.expr: (sum (lps_pegin_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="paid"}) or vector(0)) - (sum (lps_pegin_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="lp_refunded"}) or vector(0))
(sum (lps_pegin_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="accepted"}) or vector(0)) - (sum (lps_pegin_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="paid"}) or vector(0))

panels.title: PegIn Quotes

panels.description: Distribution of the current PegOut quotes

targets.expr: (sum (lps_pegout_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="paid"}) or vector(0)) - (sum (lps_pegout_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="lp_refunded"}) or vector(0))
(sum (lps_pegout_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="accepted"}) or vector(0)) - (sum (lps_pegout_quotes{job="$job", instance=~"$instance", state="paid"}) or vector(0))

panels.title: PegOut Quotes

panels.description: Distribution of log levels in LPS application
panels.title: Log Level Distribution

panels.description: Recent LPS application logs from all log levels
panels.title: LPS Application Logs

panels.description: Version of the LPS. If the value is "Not provided" means that such information was not included during the compilation of the server.
panels.title: Liquidity Provider Server Version

panels.description: Commit of the LPS build. If the value is "Not provided" means that such information was not included during the compilation of the server.
panels.title: Liquidity Provider Server revision

panels.description: Average total bytes of memory reserved across all process instances of a job.
panels.title: Total Reserved Memory

panels.description: Average memory reserved, and actually in use, by the heap, across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Heap Memory

panels.description: Average memory reservations by the runtime, not for stack or heap, across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Other Memory Reservations

panels.description: Average rate of heap object allocation, across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Heap Object Allocation Rate

panels.description: Average allocation rate in bytes per second, across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Allocation Rate, Bytes

panels.description: Average number of goroutines across instances of a job.
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Average number of live memory objects across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Number of Live Objects

panels.description: The number used bytes at which the runtime plans to perform the next GC, averaged across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Next GC, Bytes

panels.description: Average stack memory usage across all instances of a job.
panels.title: Stack Memory Use

title: Flyover - Liquidity Provider Server
